commands.review_summary:
The PR changes the cron main-session wake-now path to treat a disabled immediate heartbeat as a successful queued handoff and adds a regression test for one-shot at-job cleanup.

PR surface: Source +3, Tests +34. Total +37 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main can enqueue the main cron system event, receive skipped disabled from runHeartbeatOnce, and then miss deleteAfterRun cleanup because only ok results delete. I did not execute the regression test locally in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The remaining blocker is contributor real-behavior proof or maintainer override, not an automation-repairable code defect.

target.title: fix(cron): treat disabled heartbeat as queued one-shot success
target.body:
## Summary
- treat a main-session one-shot cron run as successful when its system event was already queued and the immediate heartbeat returns `skipped: disabled`
- preserve existing retry/fallback behavior for busy heartbeat skips and existing skipped behavior for other non-disabled heartbeat skip reasons
- add a regression test covering the reported scheduled `at` job cleanup path

Fixes #91775.

## Real behavior proof
- **Behavior or issue addressed**: One-shot `at` cron jobs targeting the main session could enqueue their system event, receive `runHeartbeatOnce` as `skipped: disabled`, and then be recorded as a skipped disabled job instead of completing and deleting after success. This PR treats the already-queued system event as the successful cron run when the immediate heartbeat is disabled.
- **Real environment tested**: Local OpenClaw PR checkout `/Users/andy/openclaw-91775-cron-at-disabled` on branch `codex/91775-one-shot-cron-disabled`, head `14fa02bec77d08192b735c0f4a4f7c3dd3fd3e2e`, Node/Vitest through repository scripts.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch**:
```sh
pnpm install --frozen-lockfile
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts
node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/cron/normalize.test.ts
pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts
OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed -- src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts
git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD
```
- **Evidence after fix**:
```text
$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts
Test Files  1 passed (1)
Tests  13 passed (13)

$ node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/cron/normalize.test.ts
Test Files  3 passed (3)
Tests  111 passed (111)

$ pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts
All matched files use the correct format.

$ OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed -- src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts
[check:changed] lanes=core, coreTests
[check:changed] completed successfully

$ git log --format='%h %an <%ae> %s' upstream/main..HEAD
14fa02bec7 Andy Ye <35905412+TurboTheTurtle@users.noreply.github.com> fix(cron): keep one-shot main jobs after disabled heartbeat
```
- **Observed result after fix**: The regression test schedules a main-session one-shot `at` job, stubs `runHeartbeatOnce` to return `{ status: "skipped", reason: "disabled" }`, verifies the system event is queued, observes the finished event status is `ok`, and verifies the `deleteAfterRun` one-shot job is removed instead of remaining as a disabled skipped row.
- **What was not tested**: I did not run a live gateway cron job against a production OpenClaw home. This is a source-repro issue and was validated with PR-head unit coverage plus the changed-file core/type/lint policy gate.

## Tests
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts src/cron/service/timer.regression.test.ts src/cron/normalize.test.ts`
- `pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts`
- `OPENCLAW_CHECK_CHANGED_REMOTE_CHILD=1 CI=1 PNPM_CONFIG_VERIFY_DEPS_BEFORE_RUN=false pnpm check:changed -- src/cron/service/timer.ts src/cron/service.runs-one-shot-main-job-disables-it.test.ts`

@clawsweeper re-review
